title: Ethiopian Squid Crumble
description: A flavorful and crunchy crumble topping, mixed with squid and spices, served with a side of flaky pastry.
instructions: Cut the squid into small pieces and season with salt, black pepper, and Ethiopian spices.
Roll out the flaky pastry and cut into small squares.
Place a piece of squid on each square and top with a spoonful of crumble mix.
Fold the pastry squares to form triangles and press the edges to seal.
Brush the tops with butter and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve hot with additional crumble mix on top.
